mapper.select: SELECT s.surveyId, s.title, s.description, s.anonymousYn, s.status, TO_CHAR(s.startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(s.endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, s.writerEmpId, TO_CHAR(s.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, TO_CHAR(s.updateDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updateDate, e.name AS writerName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM surveyQuestion q WHERE q.surveyId = s.surveyId) AS questionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM surveyResponse r WHERE r.surveyId = s.surveyId) AS responseCount FROM survey s LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON s.writerEmpId = e.empId WHERE s.surveyId = #{surveyId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT survey_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO survey (surveyId, title, description, anonymousYn, status, startDate, endDate, writerEmpId, regDate, updateDate) VALUES (#{surveyId}, #{title}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{anonymousYn}, #{status}, TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{writerEmpId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE survey SET title = #{title}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, anonymousYn = #{anonymousYn}, startDate = TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), endDate = TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), updateDate = SYSDATE WHERE surveyId = #{surveyId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM surveyAnswer WHERE responseId IN (SELECT responseId FROM surveyResponse WHERE surveyId = #{surveyId})
mapper.select: SELECT questionId, surveyId, questionText, questionType, sortOrder FROM surveyQuestion WHERE surveyId = #{surveyId} ORDER BY sortOrder
mapper.insert:
SELECT surveyQuestion_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO surveyQuestion (questionId, surveyId, questionText, questionType, sortOrder) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{surveyId}, #{questionText}, #{questionType}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT optionId, questionId, optionText, sortOrder FROM surveyOption WHERE questionId = #{questionId} ORDER BY sortOrder
mapper.insert:
SELECT surveyOption_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO surveyOption (optionId, questionId, optionText, sortOrder) VALUES (#{optionId}, #{questionId}, #{optionText}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT t.targetId, t.surveyId, t.targetType, t.targetValue, CASE t.targetType WHEN 'ALL' THEN '전체' WHEN 'DEPT' THEN (SELECT deptName FROM department WHERE deptCode = t.targetValue) WHEN 'EMP' THEN (SELECT name FROM employee2 WHERE empId = t.targetValue) END AS targetName FROM surveyTarget t WHERE t.surveyId = #{surveyId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT surveyTarget_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO surveyTarget (targetId, surveyId, targetType, targetValue) VALUES (#{targetId}, #{surveyId}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM surveyTarget WHERE surveyId = #{surveyId}) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM surveyTarget WHERE surveyId = #{surveyId} AND ( targetType = 'ALL' OR (targetType = 'DEPT' AND targetValue = #{deptCode}) OR (targetType = 'EMP' AND targetValue = #{empId}) ) ) END FROM dual
mapper.insert:
SELECT surveyAnswer_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO surveyAnswer (answerId, responseId, questionId, optionId, answerText, scoreValue) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{responseId}, #{questionId}, #{optionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{answerText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scoreValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select: SELECT o.optionId, o.questionId, o.optionText, o.sortOrder, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM surveyAnswer a WHERE a.optionId = o.optionId) AS selectCount FROM surveyOption o WHERE o.questionId = #{questionId} ORDER BY o.sortOrder
SELECT answerId, responseId, questionId, answerText FROM surveyAnswer WHERE questionId = #{questionId} AND answerText IS NOT NULL ORDER BY answerId
SELECT NVL(AVG(scoreValue), 0) FROM surveyAnswer WHERE questionId = #{questionId} AND scoreValue IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
SELECT surveyFile_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO surveyFile (fileId, surveyId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, regDate) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{surveyId}, #{oriFilename}, #{saveFilename}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT fileId, surveyId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM surveyFile WHERE surveyId = #{surveyId} ORDER BY fileId
SELECT fileId, surveyId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM surveyFile WHERE fileId = #{fileId}
